address.Address: Plot No. 155, Urban Estate, Sector 15A, Faridabad, Haryana 121007, India

school_address.streetAddress: Plot No. 155, Urban Estate, Sector 15A, Faridabad, Haryana 121007, India

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: The school's events are extremely disappointing, as they consistently favor a select group of students, completely overlooking the rest. It's disheartening to see the same faces on stage every time, making others feel invisible. When will the school prioritize inclusivity and give all students a chance to shine?

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: It is a worst school I had ever seen  they only focus on admission of student ang giving teachers work for lead call for more time and no system is follow there  they appoint teacher as trainee and after 7 days reject it by giving no reason

reviews.author: Lalit Choudhary
reviews.review_body: Pethatic school managment give teacher target for admission. They don't have special educater they terminate your child after taking admission fees books and dress charges. Principal is very arrogant not higher irresponsible. Pathetic GD goenka Branch.

reviews.author: vaishali jaiz
reviews.review_body: Worst school I have seen in my life it's not a school it's a business center. There is no future of your child they need only your money once you pay the admission charges and purchase dress and books after few months they terminate your child. I same things done with my friend son Aryan Pandey.

reviews.author: meeshu's kitchen
reviews.review_body: This is the Worst school I have ever seen in my life.. they do fraud with parents by taking money..and the pathetic management are so irritating...a bigggg no to this school...

reviews.author: Amit Goyal
reviews.review_body: Worst school, I have experienced in my life. They are just running the school in the name of GD Goenka. But no experiance teacher and staff.

reviews.author: Shashank Dixit
reviews.review_body: Worst branch sector 89 of GD Goenka, they are making froud in name of GD Goenka, not having fund to give salary to teachers timely, conversion of inquiry to admission is very less so they give target to teachers for admission, principal is very arrogant, higher management is irresponsible, not as good environment as other branches of GD have...

reviews.author: Manish Kumar
reviews.review_body:
Best paramedical institute
Excellent service provider management
